'''âf-y-k-v''' ('''kafaykevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:euthanatize|euthanatize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-y-k-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:euthanatize|euthanatize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-y-k-v
|-
! Lemma
| kafaykevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifaykevoko|thifaykevoko]] || [[word:jifaykevoko|jifaykevoko]] || [[word:shifaykevoko|shifaykevoko]] || [[word:kifaykevoko|kifaykevoko]]
|-

|-

|-
